Air_Emission_SOP.document_description: Provides SOP for maintaining clean air supply in process systems. Includes handling of gas cylinders and safe operational practices. Focuses on safety, inspection, and proper usage.

28_OCP_for_coal_crusher.document_description: Covers startup and inspection of coal crusher system. Includes checks for gearbox, belts, hammers, and abnormal noise. Ensures smooth and safe crushing operation.

28_OCP_for_coal_screen.document_description: Describes inspection and maintenance of coal vibrating screen. Ensures proper screening, avoids blockages and equipment damage. Includes safety checks and reporting procedures.

29_OCP_Boiler_Cold_Start_Up_Procedure.document_description: Covers full startup of boiler from cold shutdown condition. Includes inspection, fuel preparation, fluidization, and ignition steps. Ensures gradual heating and stable operation.

30_OCP_BOiler_Hot_start_up_procedure.document_description: Describes restarting boiler when it is already in hot condition. Includes pressure-temperature based steps and valve operations. Ensures quick yet safe return to normal operation.

31_OCP_Boiler_bed_drain.document_description: Provides procedure to drain excess bed material from the boiler. Maintains proper fluidization and pressure conditions in the furnace. Highlights safety precautions during high-temperature handling.

31_OCP_Boiler_Start_up_during_Block_out.document_description: Explains boiler startup procedure during power failure conditions. Includes DG startup, restoring auxiliary systems, and stabilizing operations. Ensures safe and controlled recovery of the plant.

33_OCP_Boiler_chemical_dozing.document_description: Describes handling and dosing of chemicals for boiler water treatment. Ensures prevention of scaling, corrosion, and operational inefficiencies. Includes safety precautions, PPE, and storage guidelines.

33_OCP_Spent_wash_tainer_cleaning.document_description: Details cleaning procedure of spent wash pump strainer. Ensures uninterrupted flow and prevents clogging or pump damage. Includes isolation, cleaning steps, and restart checks.

Distillery_Process.document_description: Contains overall distillery operational procedures and process flow. Includes yeast propagation, fermentation, and stabilization steps. Focuses on maintaining product quality and process consistency.

DBAG_Boiler.process_description: Boiler generates high-pressure steam by burning fuel in the furnace. The steam is used across the plant for heating, evaporation, and power requirements.

Boiler_KPI.document_description: Contains overall distillery operational procedures and process flow. Includes yeast propagation, fermentation, and stabilization steps. Focuses on maintaining product quality and process consistency.
